title: Durability Speed
description: Mod that makes tool effectiveness scale with durability.
body: Join our Discord Server: For information, help, bug reports and anything else related to the project, join the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/P4dUsxv6An)! About: A very simple mod that makes tool effectiveness scale with durability. For "balance" reasons tools will start with 2x speed, and slowly approach 0x speed as the durability falls to zero. [![](https://res.cloudinary.com/marcomontalbano/image/upload/v1655383645/video_to_markdown/images/youtube--NMl8yqTF3ss-c05b58ac6eb4c4700831b2b3070cd403.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NMl8yqTF3ss "") Interested in hosting a server for any of my mods? Be sure to go with Bloom Host [here](https://billing.bloom.host/aff.php?aff=10). [](https://billing.bloom.host/aff.php?aff=10) Buying a server using this link supports me directly!
